24 September 2026 - first canvass, three witnesses interviewed

5 October 2026 - lab returned common fiber, non-distinctive

Pack with newsprint, foam, ziploc silica
Copy plain-spoken, third person minimal. Photograph in the morning north light. Include one wrist shot, one stone close-up, one full profile.
FedEx Ground for everything domestic. Insured to piece value plus 10 percent buffer. Newsprint plus foam plus small silica bag. No exclamation marks in customer messages.
Refresh tags for winter search Nov 1
1978 Ford F-150. Bought August 2023 from a rancher near Ramah. Frame solid, cab straight. Currently at 40 percent restoration.
Wiring harness stripped, ready for new fuse block

Personal photo book of Zuni Mountains hikes over the year. Not for sale. Coffee-table format, roughly 60 pages. Print through the print shop in Gallup.

Duty pistol qualification at Fort Wingate 3 November 08:00. Off-duty carry qualification same day. Standard NMLEA course, 50 rounds each.
Existing HVAC on ranch is a 2003 gas furnace, marginal AC. Plan for a heat pump with resistance backup. Get three quotes.
